zh.lifeSummary: 當Margred Verch Madog Fychan於大約1294年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl35歲，母親Gwladus verch Gruffydd65歲。她於大約1328年與Llywelyn ap Gruffydd在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾勒斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margred Verch Madog Fychan于大约1294年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl35岁，母亲Gwladus verch Gruffydd65岁。她于大约1328年与Llywelyn ap Gruffydd在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾勒斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margred Verch Madog Fychan was born about 1294, in Wales, her father, Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl, was 35 and her mother, Gwladus verch Gruffydd, was 65. She married Llywelyn ap Gruffydd about 1328, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margred Verch Madog Fychan est née environ 1294, à Galles, son père, Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gwladus verch Gruffydd, avait 65 ans. Elle a épousé Llywelyn ap Gruffydd environ 1328, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margred Verch Madog Fychan um 1294 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl 35 und ihre Mutter Gwladus verch Gruffydd 65. Sie hat um 1328 in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Llywelyn ap Gruffydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

Lei sposato Llywelyn ap Gruffydd circa 1328, nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Madog Fychan(이)가 대략 1294년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladus verch Gruffydd(은)는 65세였다. 그녀는 대략 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 Llywelyn ap Gruffydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margred Verch Madog Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Gales, seu pai, Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gwladus verch Gruffydd, tinha 65 anos. Ela casou-se com Llywelyn ap Gruffydd aproximadamente 1328, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margred Verch Madog Fychan родилась около 1294 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladus verch Gruffydd, 65. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywelyn ap Gruffydd около 1328 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margred Verch Madog Fychan nació aproximadamente 1294, en Gales, su papá, Madog Fychan ap Madog Crypl, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gwladus verch Gruffydd, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Llywelyn ap Gruffydd aproximadamente 1328, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
